summary: Install the plugins and skills needed to ship a typed Next.js + Vercel/Netlify project from scaffold to prod.

outputs.name: installed_stack_manifest
outputs.description: List of plugins installed and skills synced.

workflow_steps: Install the 15 Claude plugins defined in the stack.
Sync e2e-review skill into every ~/.claude* profile.

verification.smoke_test: Run `claude plugins list` and verify vercel, frontend-design, feature-dev, and sentry are installed.
